title: Hololive Product
description: add a bunch of Hololive merchandise item
body:
**NOTE: THIS ARE NOT AN OFFICIAL HOLOLIVE PRODUCT**

**WARNING: If you GPU VRAM is less than 4 GB, it may crash you game. you can fix that by download the downscale version on my github page**

## add a lots of hololive plushies to you game
![all plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff449616b75d8db1e69ff7650e474daff0267573.jpeg)

## Standee acrylic that you can place on the same block
![standee1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f2d56815ab828cfb67412471e2d26c0c5422f46.jpeg)
![Autofister](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac7fdd53089ae42dfd318390e92f6160c0ecea03.jpeg)


plushies can be craft by put white wool into stonecutter
and standee acrylic can be craft by put glass into stonecutter

Right now have 69 Plushie and 420 Stande Acrylic (this number is not a joke or intension, I just notice this while writing this)
